# La Grandè Events

> Premium event management company based in Hyderabad, Telangana, India.
> Contact: lagrandeventplanners@gmail.com | hello@lagrandeevents.in | +91 9989838909

La Grandè Events (stylised: La Grandè Events) is a full-service event management company
headquartered in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. Founded with the belief that every event should
leave people with a feeling they carry home, the company has grown to manage 50+ corporate events,
1000+ delegates, and has earned a 4.9-star Google rating.

## What We Do

La Grandè Events provides end-to-end event planning, design, and execution across six primary categories:

- **Corporate Events** — conferences, annual days, award nights, team outings, town halls
- **Weddings & Celebrations** — mehendi, sangeet, wedding ceremony, reception
- **Product Launches** — brand activations, press conferences, launch parties
- **Social Celebrations** — birthday parties, anniversaries, baby showers
- **MICE & Corporate Offsites** — corporate retreats, incentive trips, destination conferences
- **Décor, Entertainment & Production** — themed décor, stage & AV, artist booking, DJ, live bands

## Key Details

- **Company name:** La Grandè Events
- **Founded:** Hyderabad, Telangana, India
- **Website:** https://www.lagrandeinc.com

- **Location:** Hyderabad, Telangana, India (serves pan-India for select events)
- **Google Rating:** 4.9 ★ (50+ reviews)
- **Events managed:** 50+ corporate, 200+ total
- **Delegates managed:** 1000+
- **Price range:** Premium (₹₹₹)
- **Operating hours:** Monday–Sunday, 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM IST

## Service Areas (Hyderabad)

Banjara Hills, Jubilee Hills, HITEC City, Gachibowli, Madhapur, Film Nagar,
Kondapur, Secunderabad, and across Hyderabad & Telangana.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What types of events does La Grandè Events manage?**
Corporate conferences, annual days, team outings, product launches, weddings, sangeet nights,
birthday celebrations, anniversary parties, MICE offsites, and more.

**Where is La Grandè Events based?**
Hyderabad, Telangana, India. We primarily serve Hyderabad and the surrounding region, with
select pan-India capabilities for destination events.

**How far in advance should I book?**
Corporate events: 4–6 weeks minimum. Weddings and large celebrations: 3–6 months in advance.

**Do you provide end-to-end services?**
Yes — venue scouting, décor & theme design, catering coordination, AV & lighting, artist
booking, photography, and full on-ground execution. One team, zero gaps.

**What is the pricing model?**
Customised quotes based on event type, guest count, and scope. Free consultation available.
Contact via WhatsApp or the website contact form.

**Do you assign a dedicated event manager?**
Yes. Every client gets a dedicated event manager as their single point of contact from
planning through execution.
